description.zh: 熟透香蕉搭配燕麥，無精製糖，鬆軟健康，冷凍保存三個月。初學者最友善的烘焙入門款。
description.en: Ripe bananas and oats with no refined sugar. Soft, wholesome, and freezer-friendly for up to 3 months. The most beginner-friendly bake to start with.

description.zh: 酥脆薄片、濃郁杏仁香，作法簡單，成品精緻，送禮自用兩相宜。常溫保存 2–3 週。
description.en: Thin, crispy, and rich with almond flavour. Simple to make, beautiful to gift. Keeps at room temperature for 2–3 weeks.
